rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that `@[simp]` on `includeRight_apply` (proof `rfl`) causes bottom-up simp to unfold `includeRight` before `counit_includeRight`, `comul_includeRight`, `antipode_includeRight`, and `map_includeRight` can fire, confirmed directly in the diff; removing the tag makes those four characteristic lemmas usable. Review 2 misses this and incorrectly approves.
